description: Variant builder — generates all required component variants and outputs CSpec YAML for Bridge execution.
notes: Bridge must be set up before this agent can resolve DS tokens.
Run '/design-workflow setup' in Bridge to index the DS from the active Figma file.
All CSpec YAML must pass through lib/compiler/compile.ts before execution.
After variants are created, run agent-a11y-audit before marking the component stable.
